name: Xiamen Yanjan New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiamen Yanjan New Material Co., Ltd. operates as a material supplier for disposable hygiene products in china. The company offers PE perforated films, 3D aperture non-woven, hot air through Non-woven, and ADL surge, which are primarily used in sanitary napkins, pads, and baby and adult diapers, as well as in medical treatment and food packaging industries. It also supplies raw materials for various hygiene products. The company also exports its products. Xiamen Yanjan New Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.
